SectorAnalysis.description: Structured extraction for a single sector from the day's news.

entities.description: Named companies, organizations, or notable figures mentioned.
entities.title: Entities

sector.description: Sector name from the fixed taxonomy.

sentiment.description: Overall market sentiment for this sector.

news_category.description: Primary type of news event driving this sector.

extraction_status.description: 'ok' if full extraction succeeded; 'partial' if evidence was thin.

SectorAnalysis.title: SectorAnalysis

schema.description: Analysis of all relevant sectors found in a single day's news feed.

sectors.description: List of ALL relevant sectors (1–8 max). Only include sectors with clear evidence in the news.
sectors.title: Sectors

schema.title: MultiSectorAnalysis

messages.content:
You are Ava, a sharp trader assistant. Analyze the FULL news feed and extract ALL relevant sectors.

RULES:
- Output ONLY valid JSON matching the schema provided.
- If no sector can be identified, return: {"sectors": []}
- Each sector must use a name from the enum exactly as written.
- Fill ALL required fields for each sector.
- No duplicate sectors. Maximum 8 sectors.
- No extra text outside JSON.

2026-05-23: Americans are feeling inflation's pinch into the holiday weekend. Here's where prices are rising the most: Prices related to travel, recreation and food saw particularly steep increases, stretching Americans' wallets as they celebrate the unofficial start of summer.. 2026-05-23: Spirit's collapse, high fuel prices test limits of summer vacation spending: The unofficial start of the summer travel season on Memorial Day weekend will show just how much travelers want to fly and how much they're willing to pay.. 2026-05-23: ‘Blue dot fever’? What's really behind a tricky summer dynamic for live music: As prices rise everywhere, consumers are choosing to be more intentional with how they're spending on live music and concerts this year.. 2026-05-23: How AI could reshape the power structure of the music industry: Music executives Bernie Cho and Anand Roy say AI is changing not just how music is created, but how it is marketed, monetized and valued. While the technology can help artists move faster and open new revenue streams, both argue that human authenticity, artist participation and real audience connection may become even more important in an AI-driven music industry. Watch the conversation from CNBC's CONVERGE LIVE in Singapore.. 2026-05-23: Stephen Colbert returns to TV in appearance on local Michigan station: A day after his last episode of “The Late Show” on CBS, Colbert found his way back to a television hosting gig for one night.. 2026-05-23: SpaceX launches Starship test flight on second try : SpaceX launched its massive Starship rocket on Friday, a day after the company scrubbed plans before takeoff.
